category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chrome DevTools MCP as Chrome DevTools for coding agents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description provides the expanded product name Chrome DevTools; source_facts.name provides the MCP package name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chrome DevTools support for coding agents; source_facts.executables lists chrome-devtools-mcp.
